questions.question:
Which of the following statements is false?



Algorithms: UGC NET CSE | January 2017 | Part 2 | Question: 25
options: Optimal binary search tree construction can be performed efficiently using dynamic programming.
Breadth-first search cannot be used to find connected components of a graph.
Given the prefix and postfix walks of a binary tree, the tree cannot be reconstructed uniquely.
Depth-first-search can be used to find the connected components of a graph.
questions.correct_answer: Breadth-first search cannot be used to find connected components of a graph.
